title: Department Manager Vacancy at The Coffee Bean India South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at The Coffee Bean India South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Department Manager with drive and ambition, The Coffee Bean India South Asia Partners in Bhopal is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About The Coffee Bean India South Asia Partners:
The Coffee Bean India South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with The Coffee Bean India South Asia Partners!
